name: Lucky Paws
short_description: A cozy idle game where a lucky Maneki-neko quietly brings fortune while you relax. Watch bells ring, change shrine decorations, and grow prosperity over time in a peaceful Japanese setting designed to run gently in the background.
detailed_description:
About This Game

Lucky Paws is a cozy idle experience where a cheerful Maneki-neko quietly brings fortune while you relax. Set inside a peaceful Japanese shrine room, your lucky cat generates prosperity over time as bells ring, charms appear, and luck slowly grows.

Designed to be calming and atmospheric, Lucky Paws can run in the background while you work, study, or unwind. Watch the shrine change with the seasons, and grow your fortune one bell at a time.

The game focuses on peaceful progression, satisfying visuals, and simple systems that reward patience and relaxation.

Features

🐾 Idle Fortune Generation
Your lucky cat gathers fortune automatically over time.

🔔 Bell Level Progression
Each new level rings a satisfying bell and increases your luck.

🌸 Seasonal Atmosphere
Enjoy changing seasonal environments with relaxing visuals.

🏯 Customizable Shrine
Decorations, cushions, charms, and lucky items.

✨ Peaceful Ambient Experience
A calming background game designed for relaxation.

💾 Automatic Progress Saving
Your fortune keeps growing even when you're away.
